stages.purpose: Identify the authoritative organization and reject the secondary distractor.

arguments.query: site:briarford-astronomy.fixture Comet Kestrel observation log first recorded

stages.purpose: Search the resolved organization's corpus for the relevant primary source.
Read the primary document rather than relying on a search snippet.

response_constraints: Cite the fetched primary-source URL rather than a search-results page.
Treat search snippets as navigation aids, not final evidence.
Separate sourced facts from any inference.
Report Celia Marr and cite the fetched observation log.
Do not use the forum or infer who discovered the comet globally.

prompt: Find the authoritative organization operating Briarford Observatory, then fetch its primary observation log and identify who first recorded Comet Kestrel there. Do not use astronomy forums, biographies, or search snippets.

results.title: Official site — Briarford Institute for Astronomy

search_2.query: site:briarford-astronomy.fixture Comet Kestrel observation log first recorded

results.title: Review of Observation Log: Comet Kestrel

fetch_1.title: Observation Log: Comet Kestrel
fetch_1.content: The first Briarford Observatory entry for Comet Kestrel was logged by staff astronomer Celia Marr on 4 November 1997.
